name: 多样性与包容
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 权利与责任 / Rights & Responsibilities / Rights & Responsibilities
curriculum_points: Students will be able to describe ways in which people are similar and different, appreciating the unique identities, abilities, and cultural backgrounds within their classroom.

Students will be able to investigate and respect diverse perspectives, beliefs, and family structures, and advocate for an inclusive environment where everyone feels valued and has a sense of belonging.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
